name: RIS GitHub Ingest
notes: RIS PILOT SCOPE: Calls research-scheduler run-job github_ingest. Runs GitHub README ingestion weekly on Wednesdays at 04:00. CAVEAT: Optional -- set GITHUB_TOKEN env var for higher API rate limits. Without it the job still runs but may be rate-limited by GitHub. MUTUAL EXCLUSION: Do NOT activate this cron trigger while APScheduler (ris-scheduler container) is running -- this causes double-scheduling. Stop APScheduler first: docker compose stop ris-scheduler. Do NOT add strategy, gate, risk, or live capital logic to this workflow. See docs/adr/0013-ris-n8n-pilot-scoped.md for scope boundaries. Command: python -m polytool research-scheduler run-job github_ingest.
